project.name: portofolio
project.domain: Personal portfolio for a designer-minded creative developer
project.runtimeConstraint: Existing Vue 3 and Vite application with Tailwind CSS 3, Lenis, lucide-vue-next, and local fontsource packages.
project.architectureConstraint: Single-page portfolio experience using existing repo data as content evidence, with no backend or new runtime dependency required for this pass.

confirmedAssumptions: The user selected the Rank 1 Gemini research direction: The Narrative Thread, described as a cinematic narrative concept.
The current visual direction should be reset from the existing warm editorial portfolio while retaining useful content evidence.
Repository evidence may inform project chapters, but the design must feel authored as a designer portfolio rather than a GitHub index.

researchIntake.userSuppliedResearch: Riset Konsep Visual Portfolio Developer Kreatif.md
usedSignals: continuous thread as navigation and progress
fitFiltering: Horizontal scroll is translated into vertical chapter progression for accessibility and mobile control.
WebGL and Three.js claims remain research inspiration only; this pass uses native CSS and existing dependencies.
Awwwards examples are treated as pattern evidence and not as surfaces to copy.

visualDirection.name: The Narrative Thread
visualDirection.summary: A portfolio staged as a cinematic storyboard where one luminous thread connects identity, craft, projects, and contact.
visualDirection.firstViewportBet: A diagonal film-thread crossing a black frame, with oversized cinematic type and a director-monitor project preview.
distinctiveMoves: Diagonal light thread that behaves as visual continuity instead of wallpaper.
Projects framed as chapters with opening credits, constraint, decision, and outcome beats.
Metadata uses film-production language while the copy remains grounded in real technical work.

motionPaletteDecision.decision: Use high-motion cinematic chapter transitions and a mixed film palette: black reel, ivory subtitle, signal red, oxidized teal, and silver metadata.
motionPaletteDecision.densityDecisionSource: The user explicitly wants the impressive designer direction first; reduced-motion and slow-network fallbacks keep the experience responsible.
motionPaletteDecision.spatialDecision: No new 3D or WebGL dependency in this pass. Spatial depth is created with layered film frames, thread transforms, scroll progress, and parallax-like CSS transforms.

conceptualAnchor.name: Cinematic storyboard thread
conceptualAnchor.anchorReference: 35mm film strip, director storyboard wall, and projector light path
conceptualAnchor.specificReferencePoint: A physical storyboard wall where frames are connected by a marked continuity thread from opening shot to final contact.
conceptualAnchor.rationale: The anchor gives structure to storytelling, motion, typography, and project evidence without copying any single portfolio reference.
conceptualAnchor.signatureMotion: Scenes enter as if a frame is pulled through a projector gate: slight vertical lift, mask reveal, and thread glow shift over 560ms with reduced-motion fallback.
conceptualAnchor.typographicDecision: Fraunces carries cinematic scene titles, Bebas Neue carries poster-scale opening credits, and Manrope carries readable body and technical metadata.
conceptualAnchor.visualRiskBudget: High distinctiveness with strict contrast, keyboard, and reduced-motion safeguards.
conceptualAnchor.motionRiskBudget: Motion is allowed for hierarchy and continuity; it must not hide content or become required to understand navigation.
cohesionChecks: Thread motion derives from the film-strip anchor
Project metadata remains readable without animation

derivedTokenLogic.anchorReference: 35mm film strip, director storyboard wall, and projector light path
derivedTokenLogic.colorDerivationSource: Black reel for stage, ivory for subtitle legibility, signal red for scene markers, oxidized teal for technical evidence, and silver for metadata.
derivedTokenLogic.spacingDerivationSource: Large poster openings, narrow subtitle measures, and strong frame gutters follow cinema poster and storyboard wall rhythm.
derivedTokenLogic.typographyDerivationSource: Display type behaves like opening credits, serif titles behave like chapter cards, body type behaves like production notes, and metadata behaves like slate markings.
derivedTokenLogic.motionDerivationSource: Projector-gate reveal, chapter advance, and thread glow create continuity; reduced motion exposes all frames immediately.
derivedTokenLogic.validationRule: Every visible motif must serve identity, project sequencing, navigation, or technical evidence. Decorative lines or glows without story function fail review.

aiSafeUiAudit.failureDefinition: A generic portfolio would use a centered hero, equal cards, dark slate gradients, and decorative glow. This direction rejects those.
aiSafeUiAudit.interchangeabilityTest: Renaming the page to a SaaS, agency, or dashboard would break the film thread, chapter credits, and storyboard evidence structure.
requiredProductSpecificSignals: Projects are written as scene chapters with constraint, decision, and outcome.
The light thread is both progress marker and content connector.
Technical stack appears as production metadata, not generic badges.
aiSafeUiAudit.paletteExplorationRule: Use a non-SaaS cinematic palette with strong contrast and a color role for each chapter state.
aiSafeUiAudit.backgroundPatternRule: Lines are allowed only as thread, frame, progress, or storyboard alignment marks.

colorTruth.productSpecificBehavior: The thread changes from signal red to oxidized teal when the user moves from story to technical evidence.

tokenSystem.implementationNote: This repository currently uses Tailwind plus CSS utility classes; this pass defines root CSS variables to reduce future hardcoded color drift.

mutationRules.mobile: The diagonal thread becomes a vertical progress spine. Chapters stack with the primary project action near the top and side navigation hidden.
mutationRules.tablet: The storyboard rail sits above chapter content while project evidence uses two-column regrouping.
mutationRules.desktop: The chapter rail becomes sticky and the hero uses split composition with a director-monitor preview.

motionSystem.signature: Projector-gate scene reveal with thread glow shift.
motionSystem.duration: 220ms for controls, 560ms for chapter reveals, 900ms for opening hero choreography.
motionSystem.reducedMotion: Disable transforms, marquee drift, and reveal masks; preserve chapter order and all content.

rules: Repeated project chapters may share the film-frame grammar but must vary by chapter metadata and evidence layout.
Interactive controls use visible focus and minimum 44px target size.
Cards use tight film-frame radii and never become rounded SaaS panels.

designExecutionHandoff.primaryExperienceGoal: Convince the visitor within the first viewport that the owner is a designer-minded developer with motion taste and grounded engineering proof.

surfacePlan.goal: Establish cinematic identity and immediately expose project proof.
Turn repository-backed work into narrative scenes with constraint, decision, and outcome.
Make the collaboration path obvious without losing the cinematic voice.

tablet.primaryOperation: top storyboard rail and grouped chapters

desktop.primaryOperation: sticky chapter rail with split hero and large film frames

libraryDecisions.purpose: Existing smooth scrolling dependency already present in package.json.
libraryDecisions.fallbackIfUnavailable: Native browser scroll with CSS scroll-behavior disabled for reduced motion.

libraryDecisions.purpose: Existing icon dependency for link and action affordances.

genericitySignals: centered hero with generic value proposition
decorative glow without thread or frame function
project copy without constraint or outcome
validBoldSignals: responsive recomposition from diagonal thread to vertical spine

allowedSources: Gemini research markdown supplied by user
public GitHub repository listing supplied by user
taintedSources: old UI palette as final direction
contextHygiene.approvedExternalConstraintUsage: Extract concepts, not assets or unique visual signatures.

forbiddenPatterns: portfolio card grid as the main experience
decorative background lines without navigation or story function
motion that hides content from keyboard users
